creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
Consolidating "account deleted by user request" tickets.

To do so, I have merged the devnull@FreeBSD.org "non-account" into ACCOUNT_DELETED@FreeBSD.org.

(e.g.:

  ./contrib/merge-users.pl spammer@spam.spamain ACCOUNT_DELETED@FreeBSD.org

)

I am now going to do a pass through the database making all of these consitent.
